package.name: picknik_007_rail_hw
package.description: MoveIt Pro hardware configuration for picknik_007: UR5e arm on a Vention MachineMotion 2 linear rail, with a Robotiq 2f-85 gripper and a wrist- mounted Realsense D415. Inherits from picknik_007_rail_mock and overrides the hardware-specific bits (real driver IPs, real camera serial).
